headline: Allen, Steinfeld Reveal Baby's Name to World
writeup: The biggest story off the field Friday was Josh Allen and wife Hailee Steinfeld publicly revealing the name of their newborn daughter, with Steinfeld sharing a heartfelt personal letter that drew widespread attention across the sports and entertainment world. On the roster front, the Bills made a notable addition by signing Ian Wheeler, the United Bowl MVP running back out of the UFL, giving Buffalo's backfield another intriguing option heading into training camp. The offensive outlook is generating buzz as analysts highlight James Cook's continued development alongside new offensive coordinator Pete Carmichael as a potentially dangerous combination for the rest of the NFL. Defensively, cornerback depth remains a quietly percolating concern, with multiple reports flagging it as a hot-button issue as July and training camp approach. Meanwhile, the old Highmark Stadium continues its demolition, marking the end of an era as the Bills prepare for life in their new facility.
